costs_slippage.method: Subtract one_way_turnover * 5 bps from replayed daily portfolio returns because qfa has no native cost/slippage arguments.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway only; --data-csv not used; no CSV fixtures used
decision_rationale: Costed random median Sharpe -0.12131964, p25 -0.5080568, worst -2.25284534 versus parent median 1.09846694, p25 0.14313315; worst drawdown -0.09633951 versus parent -0.22133662.

divergent_child_idea.rationale: Test scheduled FOMC/CPI/payroll/Treasury liquidity windows with cross-asset breadth instead of month-boundary seasonality.
divergent_child_idea.title: Macro-liquidity scheduled ETF flow pressure

orthogonality_checks.method: Pearson correlation of overlapping daily equity returns from cost-adjusted main equity curve vs parent replay and retained latest.json equity curves where available.

parameters.positioning: Equal-weight long ETF basket during AR-021 observed-session month window only when SPY volatility/trend/drawdown gate is open; flat otherwise. qfa normalizes nonzero gross to 1.0.

turnover.method: Ex-post target-weight replay; one_way_turnover = 0.5 * sum(abs(w_t - w_t-1)); daily cost = turnover * 5 bps subtracted from portfolio return.

primary_turnover.method: Ex-post target-weight replay; one_way_turnover = 0.5 * sum(abs(w_t - w_t-1)); daily cost = turnover * 5 bps subtracted from portfolio return.

random_period_protocol.method: Eight deterministic pseudo-random windows reused from AR-021-style validation across 2021-2025; each candidate and parent comparison run through qfa with Alpaca real data and no --data-csv, then externally cost-adjusted at 5 bps one-way turnover.

warnings: qfa backtester normalizes any nonzero weights to 1.0 gross, so exposure reduction is implemented as active/flat gating only.

AR-021 parent observed-session end-of-month logic uses only sessions available as of context; this can make the pre-month-end leg broad in qfa replay, so results should be interpreted as refinement of the implemented AR-021 artifact rather than a pure future-known last-session calendar.
qfa has no native transaction-cost/slippage support; 5 bps one-way turnover haircut is ex-post.
No daemon was run, no orders/trades were placed, no secrets are stored in artifacts.
